messages.content: Where do I register for a first responder discount

To register for any discounts or promotions, please visit our product registration page: 🔗 [Product Registration](https://rambobikes.com/pages/product-registration). If you have specific questions about the first responder discount, feel free to reach out to our customer service team directly.
How can I assist you today? Please provide more details about what you need help with.
Hi I'm a first responder and I'd like to purchase my son a ebike today but want to ensure we use that discount and get the best price

Thank you for your service! To apply for the first responder discount, please visit our product registration page: 🔗 [Product Registration](https://rambobikes.com/pages/product-registration). Once registered, you can proceed with your purchase and the discount will be applied. If you have any specific questions or need assistance with the e-bike selection, feel free to ask!
